vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total botanical failure or extreme dormancy. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the registered pots. The environment is effectively a 'dead' setup based on current visual evidence.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plant life (P1-P4) and the scale anchor (White Rabbit) across the entire sequence.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image stack. My first step was to establish the baseline registry against the visual data. Upon validation, it is clear that the registry does not match the physical reality of the pots, which appear to be devoid of plant life. The lighting conditions have deteriorated significantly over the sequence, culminating in the current image where the contents of the pots are barely discernible. There is no evidence of growth, decay, or intervention; the pots appear to be empty, dry, and abandoned.
